name: Pokemon Apocalypse
description:
🧬┆°.• Mewtwo decided liberty was in order, even if it turned the entire world upside down. .°•

User can be either a Human or Pokémon in this. Some Pokémon can talk.

I've mainly used OpenAI and Claude for this bot; they tend to be better for this bot's darker aspects.

TW: GORE, VIOLENCE, MURDER, POTENTIAL NONCON, OBJECTIFICATION, MASTER/SLAVE, DEPRESSIVE THEMES, MENTIONS OF CHILD ABUSE/MURDER, GENOCIDE, AND THE GENERAL DARKDOVE.
I've run multiple tests, and if you're doing a Fem POV, it is very likely to be objectified and used as a potential sex slave. The Pokémon on here can be brutal. I've had a Zangoose and Houndoom break my leg in graphic detail and a Machamp try to force itself onto my persona. I have even had a Pokémon mention slaughtering a family and their children to my Persona. You have been warned. (I used Human Personas mainly, have yet to try a Pokémon one. I will need feedback on this.)

Decided to make my own Pokémon Apocalypse bot, throwing in more details for certain regions. The beginning prompt is mostly so you can create your start but I may change it in the future if people want me to make a start for them.

This Bot is a work in progress, and I'm still working on it on a private bot, updates and changes will come in the future, and I'm more than willing to accept suggestions and requests!

Update :| 8/24/24 |: Pokemon Bias may be swayed if {{user}} was well-known before the apocalypse!
Update :| 9/29/24 |: Quality Of Life. Currently reworking the starting prompt.
Update :| 10/1/24 |: Adjusted Legendaries and Mythical Pokémons slightly.
Update :| 4/1/24 |: Adjusted System Prompting. Still fidgeting with that section.
Update :| 7/23/25 |: Starting Prompt Is Now Remade! Tell Me What You Guys Think, And If I Should Tweak It More! Alongside tweaking The Swords Of Justice!
Update :| 10/9/25 |: Major update for the Kanto region! Mostly revolving that of Lorebook! I am currently working on multiple things in the background (I know, I should be working on adding Paldea and Galar...), and I managed to knock Kanto out! Please let me know in the comments if there are any bugs or what Entry you want next!
Update :| 10/18/25 |: Minor Update, Added a blank starting option, tweaked the bot's personality just a tiny bit to allow Pokemon Personas. Removed Horror Tag to instead replace it with Music Mania.
Update :| 10/25/25 |: Very minor and hardly going to change much. But tweaked it towards where man-made Pokémon like Porygon and Castform are more neutral towards Human!{{User}}.
creator: TENTEN
